Hybrid Arts /Consulting
HomeArtMusicConsultingAboutFAQContactBlog

I work with artists seeking collaborators outside the arts, organizations bringing artists into their work, and museums rethinking how they support collaborative practice.

What I offer depends on what you need: strategy, coaching, curating, program development, facilitation. Sometimes it's helping an artist articulate a vision that doesn't fit existing categories. Sometimes it's helping an institution define what a meaningful collaboration with an artist may look like. Sometimes it's making introductions between people who should be talking.

My expertise is cross-sector collaboration in the arts: embedding artists in science, technology, higher education, healthcare, community development, government. Twenty years doing this as artist, curator, and administrator; I know where the friction points are and what makes these partnerships work. If you're working on something that doesn't fit existing structures, let's talk.
